job_posting:
Data Analyst — Evergreen Data Co. (Austin, TX; hybrid)

Evergreen Data is hiring a Data Analyst to support our analytics team. You'll build dashboards, run analyses, and partner with stakeholders to inform decisions.

Responsibilities: analyze datasets, build reports, collaborate cross-functionally.
Requirements: demonstrated experience with SQL and a BI tool; strong written and verbal communication. We evaluate candidates on job-related competencies and provide reasonable accommodations throughout the hiring process.

Salary range: $95,000-$120,000 plus equity, medical/dental/vision, 401(k) match, and 18 days PTO. We are an equal-opportunity employer and welcome applicants of all backgrounds.
